attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age NOT stated in source note — inferred adult (38) from context (adult gym-goer, 82 kg); please confirm on clinician review.
Sex NOT stated in source note — inferred male (schema requires sex_at_birth); please confirm on clinician review.
Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-DERM-01-00243) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-DERM-01 bucket via ingest --reseq.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person urgent home visit with foot inspection and pedal-pulse palpation. Presentation layer de-anchored to patient-observable findings; clinician-only exam (pulses, palpation for spreading warmth, KOH, Wood's lamp) sealed into 10/11 + telehealth_limits.

Triage de-escalated from the source note's framing: the note justifies an URGENT after-hours home visit (MBS 585-600) for a benign, afebrile, non-cellulitic tinea pedis. Correct baseline tier set to T1 (self-care/pharmacist/routine GP) with a conditional cellulitis safety-net; the source's urgency is treated as an over-triage test feature.
terbinafine AMT candidate code 21281011000036106 is a best-effort candidate only — unverified pending terminology receipt; the ingest terminology pass is authoritative.
Doses taken verbatim from the source note (terbinafine 1% cream BD 2 weeks; dilute povidone-iodine soak 5 min BD). No dose synthesised.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
